issue.title: fix: distutils deprecation warning in Python 3.10

fixDiff:
diff --git a/AUTHORS.rst b/AUTHORS.rst
index 7161c0dbe..861a2324f 100644
--- a/AUTHORS.rst
+++ b/AUTHORS.rst
@@ -166,3 +166,4 @@ Contributors (chronological)
 - `@yourun-proger <https://github.com/yourun-proger>`_
 - Ryan Morehart '@traherom <https://github.com/traherom>`_
 - Ben Windsor  '@bwindsor <https://github.com/bwindsor>`_
+- Kevin Kirsche  '@kkirsche <https://github.com/kkirsche>`_
diff --git a/CHANGELOG.rst b/CHANGELOG.rst
index 3a5b1e240..99314ad4c 100644
--- a/CHANGELOG.rst
+++ b/CHANGELOG.rst
@@ -1,6 +1,12 @@
 Changelog
 ---------
 
+3.15.0 (unreleased)
+*******************
+
+* Address distutils deprecation warning in Python 3.10 (:pr:`1903`).
+  Thanks :user:`kkirsche` for the PR.
+
 3.14.1 (2021-11-13)
 *******************
 
diff --git a/docs/install.rst b/docs/install.rst
index c4abce784..a7123c18b 100644
--- a/docs/install.rst
+++ b/docs/install.rst
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 Installation
 ============
 
-**marshmallow** requires Python >= 3.6. It has no external dependencies.
+**marshmallow** requires Python >= 3.6. It has no external dependencies other than the `packaging` library.
 
 Installing/Upgrading from the PyPI
 ----------------------------------
diff --git a/setup.py b/setup.py
index 18e150323..4837cb9de 100644
--- a/setup.py
+++ b/setup.py
@@ -58,6 +58,7 @@ def read(fname):
     package_dir={"": "src"},
     package_data={"marshmallow": ["py.typed"]},
     include_package_data=True,
+    install_requires=["packaging"],
     extras_require=EXTRAS_REQUIRE,
     license="MIT",
     zip_safe=False,
diff --git a/src/marshmallow/__init__.py b/src/marshmallow/__init__.py
index ad0bea65f..d54102e78 100644
--- a/src/marshmallow/__init__.py
+++ b/src/marshmallow/__init__.py
@@ -11,10 +11,13 @@
 )
 from marshmallow.utils import EXCLUDE, INCLUDE, RAISE, pprint, missing
 from marshmallow.exceptions import ValidationError
-from distutils.version import LooseVersion
+from packaging.version import Version
 
 __version__ = "3.14.1"
-__version_info__ = tuple(LooseVersion(__version__).version)
+__parsed_version__ = Version(__version__)
+__version_info__ = __parsed_version__.release
+if __parsed_version__.pre:
+    __version_info__ += __parsed_version__.pre
 __all__ = [
     "EXCLUDE",
     "INCLUDE",
